question: What is the current job title of my Helix teammate?

haystack_sessions.content: Started my new job today at Nimbus Labs. I'm on the Helix project with a teammate named Priya.
Congrats on the new role at Nimbus Labs! Working with Priya on Helix sounds exciting.
I really prefer tea over coffee, and I usually work late on Thursdays.
Tea it is — and a Thursday night owl. Noted.
Spent the day deep in the Helix codebase. It's written in Rust and backed by a Postgres database.
Rust plus Postgres is a solid stack for Helix.
I adopted a dog! Her name is Biscuit and she's a beagle.
Welcome to the family, Biscuit the beagle!
Priya is our team lead. She actually used to work at Acme before joining Nimbus.
Good context on Priya — team lead, ex-Acme.
I started learning to play the guitar. My instructor is a guy named Marcus.
Nice — guitar lessons with Marcus. Have fun!
Huge week — we shipped the launch. Right after it, Priya was promoted to Director.
Massive milestone, and a well-earned promotion to Director.
Rough day: Biscuit had surgery on her leg. The vet says she'll recover fully.
Sorry to hear about the leg surgery — glad Biscuit's expected to fully recover.
Turns out Marcus also teaches piano, not just guitar. I'm tempted to switch.
Marcus teaching piano too gives you a nice option to switch.
Planning a trip to Japan this fall with Priya and another coworker.
A fall trip to Japan with Priya sounds wonderful!
